headline: Bernstein Updates Rail View, Lifts CSX Price Target
summary: CSX Corporation (NASDAQ:CSX) is included among the 14 Cheap DRIP Stocks to Buy Now. On March 31, Bernstein analyst David Vernon raised the firm’s price recommendation on CSX Corporation (NASDAQ:CSX) to $39 from $36. It maintained a Market Perform rating on the shares. The firm said it is updating its view on the rail sector […]
